subcodes.title: Words to Tamaddunu'l-Mulk, spoken on 1911-08-25
subcodes.first_line: Once, when I lived in Baghdad, I was invited to the house of a poor thorn-picker. In Baghdad the heat is greater even than in Syria
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @hospitality, @humility; meekness; lowliness
